verification_tiers.T3: Numerically verified (consistent calculations, no formal proof)

gamma_unconstrained.mechanism: ACS unconstrained Meissner partition function solution Z(gamma) = 1

gamma_physical.mechanism: SU(2) Gauss constraint via Chern-Simons singlet projection

torsion_coupling_spectrum.mechanism: exact eigenvalues of C = sum ad_Ta^dag ad_Ta on sl(4); block-scalar => torsion coupling resolves only the Palatini split

proved_theorems.statement: The Lie bracket [f,g] is the exact second-order Taylor coefficient of the net transfer entropy Delta I under short-time evolution.
proved_theorems.label: BCH-TE Morphism

proved_theorems.statement: The Wronskian of the counting fluctuation is non-vanishing along the critical line, establishing stationarity under the Riemann Hypothesis.
proved_theorems.label: Wronskian Stationarity Theorem

proved_theorems.statement: The boundary state space is the orthogonal complement of the bulk gauge orbit under the algebra's Killing form.
proved_theorems.label: Killing Orthogonality Theorem

proved_theorems.statement: The graded spectral functional S_f[P] = Tr(P_ad * f(ad_T)) is uniquely minimized at the Lorentzian signature (3+1) for classical Lie algebra types.
proved_theorems.label: Grading Selection Theorem

explicitly_falsified_claims.label: ad^3 = 2*ad
explicitly_falsified_claims.falsification_evidence: fails for integer eigenvalues; requires non-integer eigenvalues lambda = 1/sqrt(2)

explicitly_falsified_claims.label: Universal 2pi inversion loop
explicitly_falsified_claims.falsification_evidence: sl(4,R) adjoint representation is hyperbolic and does not close into a 2pi loop; only su(2) quaternion closes

explicitly_falsified_claims.label: Wronskian-Poisson equivalence
explicitly_falsified_claims.falsification_evidence: Leibniz failure by -f*g*h' term; proved symbolically and numerically in wronskian_leibniz.py

explicitly_falsified_claims.label: IR lattice imprint
explicitly_falsified_claims.falsification_evidence: PDG masses and CKM mixing matrices show no statistically significant imprint of the <2,3> lattice

explicitly_falsified_claims.label: theta0-not-derivable-from-algebra
explicitly_falsified_claims.falsification_evidence: [h,omega] spans sl(4) rank=15 (gl4_asymmetry_map.py); Function=[k_dir,Form] annihilates BCH hierarchy (vacuum_theta0.py); theta0=2/9 is fit necessarily

explicitly_falsified_claims.label: EM-as-torsion-annihilator (both forms)
explicitly_falsified_claims.falsification_evidence: centralizer of full torsion sector Sym0(4) in sl(4) is {0} (nothing is torsion-null); Q=J3+K3+T_BL/2 not in ker(ad_T_BL); coupling operator is block-scalar with exact spectrum {4 (x9 sym), 6 (x6 o(4))} so no direction is graded; test_conjecture_em_torsion_annihilator.py

open_problems.problem: FeynRules / UFO model file export for the Palatini SU(3) Higgs model to run LHC-testable simulations.
Constructing a self-adjoint operator whose eigenvalue positions carry the prime staircase without violating GUE spacing universality.
Formulating the variational action principle for the generalized information-dynamics Lagrangian.
